---
title: ""
---

::: {.columns}

:::: {.column width="35%"}

<div class="profile-card">

![](images/profile.jpg){width=85%}

# Arnau Garcia-Fernández

##### PhD Candidate in Biostatistics

#### [Erasmus MC](https://www.erasmusmc.nl/en/research/departments/biostatistics)

<div class="contact-icons">

<a href="mailto:a.garciafernandez@erasmusmc.nl">
  <img src="images/icons/mail.png" width="28px">
</a>

<a href="https://github.com/ArnauGF" target="_blank">
  <img src="images/icons/github.png" width="28px">
</a>

<a href="https://orcid.org/0009-0009-7370-6980" target="_blank">
  <img src="images/icons/orcid.png" width="28px">
</a>

<a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=AjEvmFUAAAAJ&hl=es&oi=ao" target="_blank">
  <img src="images/icons/scholar.png" width="28px">
</a>

<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/garciaarnaumaths/" target="_blank">
  <img src="images/icons/linkedin.png" width="28px">
</a>

</div>

</div>



::::

:::: {.column width="65%"}

## About Me

I am a PhD candidate in Biostatistics at Erasmus MC in Rotterdam, the Netherlands. I work on methods and software for survival analysis, longitudinal analysis and joint modeling.

## Upcoming talks

<div class="talk-card">

<div class="talk-conference">
40th International Workshop on Statistical Modelling (IWSM)
</div>

Oslo, Norway, June 28 -- July 3, 2026.

<div class="talk-authors">
<strong>A. Garcia-Fernández</strong>, D. Rizopoulos, J. Kooiman, P. Miranda-Afonso.
</div>

<div class="talk-title">
"A Strictly Proper Metric for Evaluating Dynamic Predictions for Left-Truncated and Right- Censored Data with Asymmetric Misclassification"
</div>

<div class="talk-badge talk-contributed">
Contributed Talk
</div>

<div class="talk-award">
🏆 Travel Award
</div>

</div>

<div class="talk-card">

<div class="talk-conference">
47th Annual Conference of the International Society for Clinical Biostatistics (ISCB)
</div>

Freiburg, Germany, September 27 -- October 1, 2026.

<div class="talk-authors">
<strong>A. Garcia-Fernández</strong>, D. Rizopoulos, J. Kooiman, P. Miranda-Afonso.
</div>

<div class="talk-title">
"A Strictly Proper Metric to Evaluate Dynamic Predictions for Left-Truncated and Right-Censored Data with Asymmetric Misclassification"
</div>

<div class="talk-badge talk-contributed">
Contributed Talk
</div>

<div class="talk-award">
🏆 Student Conference Award (StCA)
</div>

</div>


::::

:::
